Name: COMBO_BEHAVIOR_PARAM
Description: Defines combo attack behavior parameters including melee/ranged attacks, movement attacks, timing, targeting, and animation control across multiple combo chains.

Fields.Name: Action 0: Combo Step 1
Fields.Description: Animation ID for the first attack in combo 0.

Fields.Name: Action 0: Combo Step 2
Fields.Description: Defines the second attack route in combo 0.

Fields.Name: Action 0: Combo Step 3
Fields.Description: Defines the third attack route in combo 0.

Fields.Name: Action 0: Combo Step 4
Fields.Description: Defines the fourth attack route in combo 0.

Fields.Name: Action 0: Melee Control Type
Fields.Description: Determines melee weapon control behavior for combo 0.

Fields.Name: Action 0: Attack ID 1
Fields.Description: Identifier for the first attack action in combo 0.

Fields.Name: Action 0: Attack ID 2
Fields.Description: Identifier for the second attack action in combo 0.

Fields.Name: Action 0: Attack ID 3
Fields.Description: Identifier for the third attack action in combo 0.

Fields.Name: Action 0: Attack ID 4
Fields.Description: Identifier for the fourth attack action in combo 0.

Fields.Name: Action 0: Bullet ID 1
Fields.Description: Projectile ID for the first ranged attack in combo 0.

Fields.Name: Action 0: Bullet ID 1
Fields.Description: Projectile ID for the first ranged attack in combo 0.

Fields.Name: Action 0: Bullet ID 3
Fields.Description: Projectile ID for the third ranged attack in combo 0.

Fields.Name: Action 0: Bullet ID 4
Fields.Description: Projectile ID for the fourth ranged attack in combo 0.

Fields.Name: Action 0: Shooting Stance Time 1
Fields.Description: Time spent in aiming stance before attack 1.

Fields.Name: Action 0: Shooting Stance Time 2
Fields.Description: Time spent in aiming stance before attack 2.

Fields.Name: Action 0: Shooting Stance Time 3
Fields.Description: Time spent in aiming stance before attack 3.

Fields.Name: Action 0: Shooting Stance Time 4
Fields.Description: Time spent in aiming stance before attack 4.

Fields.Description: Determines if attack 1 can be interrupted.

Fields.Description: Determines if attack 2 can be interrupted.

Fields.Name: Action 0: Non-interruptible Type 3
Fields.Description: Determines if attack 3 can be interrupted.

Fields.Name: Action 0: Non-interruptible Type 4
Fields.Description: Determines if attack 4 can be interrupted.

Fields.Name: Action 0: Walking Attack ID 1
Fields.Description: Attack ID used while moving for attack 1.

Fields.Name: Action 0: Walking Attack ID 2
Fields.Description: Attack ID used while moving for attack 2.

Fields.Name: Action 0: Walking Attack ID 3
Fields.Description: Attack ID used while moving for attack 3.

Fields.Name: Action 0: Walking Attack ID 4
Fields.Description: Attack ID used while moving for attack 4.

Fields.Name: Action 0: Homing Cancel Setting 1
Fields.Description: Whether homing is disabled for attack 1.

Fields.Description: Whether homing is disabled for attack 2.

Fields.Name: Action 0: Homing Cancel Setting 3
Fields.Description: Whether homing is disabled for attack 3.

Fields.Name: Action 0: Homing Cancel Setting 4
Fields.Description: Whether homing is disabled for attack 4.

Fields.Description: Effective range for attack 1 while moving.

Fields.Description: Effective range for attack 2 while moving.

Fields.Description: Effective range for attack 3 while moving.

Fields.Name: Action 0: Walking Attack Range 4
Fields.Description: Effective range for attack 4 while moving.

Fields.Name: Action 0: Attack Startup Speed Multiplier 1
Fields.Description: Speed multiplier applied during the startup (wind-up) phase of attack 1 in combo 0.

Fields.Description: Speed multiplier applied during the startup (wind-up) phase of attack 2 in combo 0.
